this activity diagram models the process of user registration within an application.
the main flow starts at the "start" node, checks for successful registration, and proceeds to the homepage if successful.
if registration fails, it prompts the creation of a new user.
there are two distinct flows: one for successfully registered users and one for those who need to create a new account.
the diagram captures the conditional logic for user registration and navigation to the homepage.

this activity diagram outlines the process of adding a report in a system.
the user starts by clicking 'add alert' in the sidebar menu.
they then click 'add category', opening a list of categories.
the system checks if the first four fields have been filled correctly.
if correct, the user presses the green button to submit the report.
if incorrect, the user needs to fill out the first four fields correctly before pressing the green button.
the process ensures that the report is submitted only when all necessary fields are filled accurately.
click 'view alerts' nel menù laterale -> visualizzazione di tutte le segnalazioni — type=transition; label="->"; explanation="click action leads to display action"
visualizzazione di tutte le segnalazioni -> click su una segnalazione — type=transition; label="->"; explanation="display action leads to click action"
click su una segnalazione -> visualizzazione dettagliata della segnalazione — type=transition; label="->"; explanation="click action leads to display action"
flow 1: click 'view alerts' nel menù laterale -> visualizzazione di tutte le segnalazioni -> click su una segnalazione -> visualizzazione dettagliata della segnalazione
this activity diagram models the process of viewing alerts and their details.
the user starts by clicking 'view alerts' in the sidebar menu.
this action leads to displaying all notifications.
the user then clicks on one notification to view its detailed information.
there are no conditions, branches, or loops visible in the diagram.

no -> correggere i dati — type=transition; label="->"; explanation="data correction required"

this activity diagram models the process of navigating through a profile section, specifically focusing on the home icon click and validation of fields. if fields are correctly filled, the user can save changes or discard them. if fields are not correctly filled, the user needs to correct the data before proceeding. the diagram also includes a loop for data correction if necessary.
